_metadata.description: BEL faculty program structures extracted read-only from Jac (curriculum.uq.edu.au) Program Rules — the authored curriculum source. Flat membership (program/section/courses); requirement logic (units, options) not captured. Single programs only; dual programs excluded (compose from singles).
_metadata.effective: Semester 1 2026 (fromYYYYSS 202601), latest Published version per program code
_metadata.calibration: UQBS subset diffed against hand-audited uqbs-programs.json: 8 exact matches incl. all majors (BAB 8/8, BAFE 2/2, BBusMan 7/7); zero contradictions; Jac fills taxonomy gaps for GCBusAdmin/GCEI cores
_metadata.known_gaps: GCBusAn (5726) and GCTHEM (5547) rules use cross-references without embedded course objects — memberships not auto-decoded; wildcard rules (e.g. 'any MKTG level 3') not captured
